reasoning: This animation sequence depicts two robots embracing.  The robots lack elbows and have limited wrist motion; therefore, I'll focus on creating a natural-looking hug using only shoulder movements. The hug will be symmetrical for simplicity. I will use a three-frame sequence to show the start, middle, and end of the embrace. In frame 1, both arms start in a neutral position. In frame 2, the arms move to the embrace position. In frame 3, the arms return to the neutral position. This avoids over-complication and keeps the sequence concise and easily understandable.
